channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter in street, 30th March
item.description:
Two of these rubbish bags have been here for a w, they're now being added to - please remove. There are various rubbish items along Norcott (incl mattress at lower end), would be great if it could all be taken at same time. Or it just gets added to.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norcott Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Ferncroft and Hollycroft Avenue, 30th March
item.description:
Sign is now almost gone. Emergency vehicles cannot recognise our street. Previously reported but no response from Council. Considering official complaint.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Ferncroft Avenue, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Litter Bins, 30th March
item.description:
Bins in surrounding area are full and need emptying
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass, 30th March
item.description:
Broken glass opposite 43 Maberley Road. Please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lot's of household rubbish over piling the bin and surrounding area., 30th March
item.description:
Someone has discarded their household goods in the bins outside 7-12 Roman Way. This makes it impossible for us to discard our general and recycling waste. It's been like this since Friday 27th March 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-18, Blanch Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 30th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Litter in overflowing bin - outside 56 Crampton St, 30th March
item.description:
Please pick up the litter that has been left by Veolia when emptying bins. The bins are overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left on street, 30th March
item.description:
One side of the street have left their bins on the pavement permanently. It started when a couple of houses were having building work done. Now it’s ridiculous. Its most of the houses. Its hard to walk down here now and pushing a buggy is impossible. Please fix this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Health hazard in the area, 30th March
item.description:
Building bin room overflows woth rubbish with door open to main road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and old leaves, 30th March
item.description:
Litter accumulating including over drain. Whole road could do with a good clean. Difficult when cars parked but it needs doing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandonned car outside of 10 St Mary's Road, 30th March
item.description:
The car has been there since 2025

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frobisher Place, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous number of bikes, 30th March
item.description:
Blocking pedestrian access. Worse than yesterday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elizabeth Bridge, Victoria, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy dirty leaves and litter not properly ceared - on the path way and in the parking area, 30th March
item.description:
Veolia is not careful when collecting rubbish. The pavements aren't cleared of debris - the leaves go back to the autumn

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Mary's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plant a tree, 30th March
item.description:
Plant a tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Truman’s Road Fly Tipping & Rubbish, 30th March
item.description:
As is always the case after the weekend and throughout the week, Truman’s Road is absolutely covered in litter from where the bins have been emptied and rubbish has fallen and nobody’s cleaned the street, plus fly tipping as usual blocking pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 30th March
item.description:
Water leak

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 30th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish dumped including a washing machine, hoover and other rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 30th March
item.description:
Dumped fridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Quernmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 30th March
item.description:
Dumped wardrobe doors

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Dumped black sacks, 30th March
item.description:
Black sacks and a tyre dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeside Close, Blendon, Greater London
